tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Install SAELens, TransformerLens, SAEBench and verify GPU access. Create shared data directories.

tasks.name: Pilot P1: CAAB Feasibility
tasks.description: Load GemmaScope JumpReLU SAE + train small TopK SAE on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Run Chanin et al. absorption detection on first-letter features (a-z). Verify >10% absorption rate difference and 15-min completion.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption rate difference between JumpReLU and TopK > 10 percentage points; experiment completes within 15 minutes

visualizations.description: Pilot absorption rate comparison (JumpReLU vs TopK)

tasks.name: Pilot P2: Causal Evaluation Feasibility
tasks.description: Train two SAEs with different sparsity levels (high vs low absorption) on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Run sparse probing on 20 concepts (4 per domain). Verify correlation between absorption rate and probe accuracy.

pilot.pass_criteria: Probe accuracy difference > 5 percentage points between high and low absorption SAEs; correlation direction matches hypothesis

tasks.name: Pilot P3: UAD Feasibility
tasks.description: Build co-occurrence matrix for 100 features from GemmaScope/GPT-2 SAE. Run hierarchical clustering. Compare with Chanin et al. supervised labels on known absorption cases (first-letter features).

pilot.pass_criteria: Precision > 40% and Recall > 30% compared to supervised labels; runtime < 15 minutes

tasks.name: Pilot P4: DFDA Feasibility
tasks.description: Train a small MLP (<1% params) to predict absorbed parent feature activation from child features on 10 known absorbed pairs from GPT-2 Small. Measure probe accuracy improvement post-compensation.

pilot.pass_criteria: Probe accuracy improvement > 5% OR reconstruction error increase < 10%; training completes within 15 minutes

tasks.name: Full E1: Cross-Architecture Absorption Benchmark
tasks.description: Systematic comparison of 5 architectures (JumpReLU, TopK, BatchTopK, Gated, Matryoshka) on Gemma-2-2B at layers 5, 10, 15, 20. Width 16k. Compute absorption rate, reconstruction quality, sparsity, dead feature ratio. Use OpenWebText 10k samples.

visualizations.description: Pareto frontier: absorption rate vs reconstruction quality

tasks.name: Full E2: Causal Impact on Downstream Tasks
tasks.description: Measure absorption's causal impact on 3 downstream tasks using Gemma-2-2B layer 10 SAEs. Tasks: (1) sparse probing on 100 concepts across 5 domains, (2) steering efficacy on 10 directions, (3) feature attribution consistency. Control for reconstruction quality and sparsity.

visualizations.description: Absorption rate vs downstream performance (partial correlation)

tasks.name: Full E3: Sparsity-Absorption Relationship
tasks.description: Train TopK SAEs with k in {10, 25, 50, 100, 200} on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Compute absorption rate at each k. Fit monotonic trend and measure Spearman correlation. Also test Standard SAE with varying L1 coefficient.

tasks.name: Full E4: Layer-Depth Absorption Pattern
tasks.description: Load GemmaScope JumpReLU SAEs at all 18 layers of Gemma-2-2B. Compute absorption rate at each layer using standardized concept set. Analyze trend across depth.

visualizations.description: Layer x concept domain absorption matrix

tasks.name: Full E5: Unsupervised Absorption Detection
tasks.description: Scale UAD to full Gemma-2-2B layer 10 SAE (16k features). Build co-occurrence matrix on 10k tokens. Validate against Chanin et al. supervised labels on all known hierarchical concepts. Report precision, recall, F1.

tasks.name: Full E6: Dynamic Feature De-Absorption
tasks.description: Scale DFDA to 50 absorbed pairs on Gemma-2-2B layer 10. Train compensation MLP. Measure probe accuracy improvement, reconstruction error change, and inference latency overhead.

visualizations.description: DFDA recovery rate per absorbed pair

tasks.name: Main Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate all experiment results. Compute partial correlations, statistical tests, generate main result tables and figures. Perform sensitivity analysis.

tasks.name: Exploratory Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate UAD and DFDA results. Generate precision-recall curves, recovery rate plots. Assess feasibility for publication.

tasks.name: Baseline: Random Pair Shuffle
tasks.description: Compute absorption rate on randomly shuffled feature pairs as a null model. This establishes the baseline for chance-level absorption detection.

tasks.name: Baseline: Direct Model Probing
tasks.description: Train linear probes directly on model activations (without SAE) as an upper bound for downstream task performance.
